title: Better 1.20 Menu
description: A Redesign of the 1.20 Menu and Background
body:
# Better 1.20 Menu
> - Minecraft: Trails & Tales Title
> - New Background with shader
> - Buttons are DARK
> - Dirt Background Changed to Dark Wool
